channel.title: Algebra & Fire
channel.description: Notes and Thoughts on Vision and Learning, by Hao Chen

item.title: Faster and Finer Instance Segmentation with BlendMask
item.description: Introduction to our new instance segmentation model, BlendMask, which generates higher qualities than Mask R-CNN while being faster in inference.
item.dc:creator: Hao Chen

item.title: NAS - Where Are We Now
item.description: The reasons why people are either running towards or away from Neural Architecture Search.
item.dc:creator: Hao Chen

item.title: On Optimization in Deep Learning
item.description: An old post about no local minima in Deep Learning.
item.dc:creator: Hao Chen
